prediction_reason.学校层次与声誉: 211工程、双一流建设高校；软科中国大学主榜2026年约第77名，近年排名稳定在72–81区间，属中上水平211；202 4年声誉评价偏负面（校园安全事件），2026年声誉文件中未收录福州大学；抖音综合热度排名第88、评价"一般"，短视频平台关注度不高；未见明显投档断档记录；化学为唯一A-学科，与化工、材料、制药等招生专业直接关联；其余专业无A-及以上学科评估，整体学科实力在211中处于中等水平。
prediction_reason.专业热度与地域: 计算机类、 电子信息/通信、电气工程等专业持续高热推荐，对物理类考生吸引力强；广西2026年普通高考总人数约39.2万，较2025年约37.96万增加约3.3%，物理类考生按近年占比约68.6% 估算约26.9万人，竞争面扩大。；福州大学位于福建省，属跨省招生；广西在福州大学全国招生中占比约2–3%，非主要生源 地，地域偏好因素影响有限。
prediction_reason.预测结论: 综合2025年位次大幅后移的走势、2026年计划小幅缩招（缓解竞争）、本省考生总数增加（加剧竞争）以及声誉热度一般等因素， 缩招效应略大于考生增加效应，预计2026年最低位次较2025年有所前移但幅度有限；预测最低位次约19586名，区间19086–20086名。

- 软件工程

major_tier_recommendation.overall_advice: 位次在预测区间19086–20086名内，建议以二档专业为主攻方向（如数字媒体技术、机器人工程、集成电路等），一档专业（电气、计算机、软件）可冲刺但录取概率较低，三档 专业（土木、工程管理、城乡规划等）作为保底选择。位次明显优于区间下限（19086名以内）可重点冲刺一档王牌专业。

历年位次与招生计划.title: Historical Rankings and Enrollment Plans
历年位次与招生计划.text: From 2021 to 2025, the minimum ranking for Physics Category (including Science) was approximately 10405 → 17208 → 14125 → 15473 → 20173, showing a fluctuating and backward trend overall, especially in 2025, which shifted back by about 4700 places compared to 2024, with a baseline ranking of about 20173. The provincial enrollment plan for Physics Category was 125 in 2021, 125 in 2022, 122 in 2023, 128 in 2024, and 133 in 2025; the 2026 plan is 126, a decrease of 7 from 2025 (a reduction of about 5.3%), and the reduction in enrollment quotas slightly eases competition pressure.

学校层次与声誉.title: School Level and Reputation
学校层次与声誉.text: A 211 Project and Double First-Class construction university; ranked approximately 77th in the 2026 Soft Science Chinese University Main Ranking, with stable rankings in the 72–81 range in recent years, belonging to the upper-middle level of 211 universities; the 2024 reputation evaluation was somewhat negative (campus safety incident), and the 2026 reputation document did not include Fuzhou University; Douyin comprehensive popularity ranking is 88th, with a rating of "average," and low attention on short video platforms; no obvious enrollment gaps were recorded; Chemistry is the only A- discipline, directly related to enrollment majors such as Chemical Engineering, Materials, and Pharmacy; other majors have no A- or above discipline evaluations, and overall disciplinary strength is at a medium level among 211 universities.

专业热度与地域.title: Major Popularity and Region
专业热度与地域.text: Majors such as Computer Science, Electronic Information/Communication, and Electrical Engineering continue to be highly recommended, strongly attracting Physics Category candidates; the total number of candidates for the 2026 Guangxi General College Entrance Examination is about 392,000, an increase of about 3.3% from about 379,600 in 2025, and Physics Category candidates, estimated at about 68.6% of the total in recent years, are about 269,000, expanding the competition scope. Fuzhou University is located in Fujian Province, which is an inter-provincial enrollment; Guangxi accounts for about 2–3% of Fuzhou University's national enrollment, not a major source region, so regional preference factors have limited impact.

预测结论.title: Prediction Conclusion
预测结论.text: Considering the significant backward shift in rankings in 2025, the slight reduction in the 2026 plan (easing competition), the increase in the number of candidates in the province (intensifying competition), and the average reputation and popularity, the reduction effect slightly outweighs the candidate increase effect. It is predicted that the minimum ranking in 2026 will move forward compared to 2025 but with limited magnitude; the predicted minimum ranking is about 19586, with a range of 19086–20086.

major_tier_recommendation_en.overall_advice: For rankings within the predicted range of 19086–20086, it is recommended to focus on Tier 2 majors (such as Digital Media Technology, Robotics Engineering, Integrated Circuits, etc.) as the main direction. Tier 1 majors (Electrical, Computer, Software) can be attempted but have a lower admission probability, while Tier 3 majors (Civil Engineering, Engineering Management, Urban and Rural Planning, etc.) serve as safety choices. For rankings significantly better than the lower limit of the range (within 19086), it is advisable to focus on sprinting for Tier 1 flagship majors.

历年位次与招生计划.title: Historical Rankings and Enrollment Plans
历年位次与招生计划.text: From 2021 to 2025, the minimum ranking for History Category (including Liberal Arts) was approximately 1547 → 1824 → 1794 → 2375 → 2387, showing an overall backward trend. In the last two years, it stabilized in the 2370–2390 range, with a baseline of about 2387 in 2025. The provincial enrollment plan for History Category was 16 in 2021, 16 in 2022, 19 in 2023, 16 in 2024, and 17 in 2025. In 2026, the plan is 14 students, a decrease of 3 from 2025 (a reduction of about 17.6%). The significant reduction in enrollment quotas somewhat eases competition pressure.

学校层次与声誉.title: University Level and Reputation
学校层次与声誉.text: A 211 Project and Double First-Class university. In the 2026 Soft Science Chinese University Main Ranking, it ranks approximately 77th, placing it in the upper-middle tier of 211 universities. Its reputation evaluation in 2024 was somewhat negative (campus safety incidents), and the 2026 reputation file did not include Fuzhou University. On Douyin, its comprehensive popularity ranking is 88th, with a rating of 'average.' No significant admission cutoff gaps were observed. Chemistry (A-) is its only A- discipline, which has no direct disciplinary correlation with the History Category majors (Law, Chinese Language and Literature, English, Sociology, International Economics and Trade). However, the 211 level still holds strong appeal for liberal arts candidates.

专业热度与地域.title: Major Popularity and Region
专业热度与地域.text: Law has high social popularity (relatively hot), Chinese Language and Literature is recommended, and English is average with a wait-and-see attitude. In 2026, the total number of candidates for the general college entrance examination in Guangxi is about 392,000. History Category candidates, estimated at about 31.4% of the total based on recent years, number approximately 123,000, an increase of about 3.3% compared to about 119,000 in 2025, expanding the competition pool. Provincial control score data for 2026 is missing and not included in the judgment. Fuzhou University is located in Fujian Province, which is a cross-provincial enrollment. Guangxi accounts for about 2–3% of Fuzhou University's national enrollment, not a major source region, so regional preference factors have limited impact.

预测结论.title: Prediction Conclusion
预测结论.text: Considering the stable backward trend of rankings in the last two years, the significant reduction in the 2026 enrollment plan (easing competition), the increase in the number of local candidates (intensifying competition), and the appeal of the 211 level to liberal arts candidates, the effect of enrollment reduction outweighs the effect of candidate increase. It is expected that the minimum ranking in 2026 will move forward compared to 2025. The predicted minimum ranking is approximately 2164, with a range of 1774–2554.

major_tier_recommendation_en.overall_advice: For rankings within the predicted range of 1774–2554, it is recommended to focus on Tier 2 majors (International Economics and Trade) as the main target. Tier 1 majors (Chinese Language and Literature, Law) can be attempted as a stretch, but rankings need to be significantly better than the lower bound of the range. Tier 3 majors (Sociology, English) serve as a safe fallback. For rankings within 2000, prioritize Law and Chinese Language and Literature as key targets.
